Container.Name: Local LLM Benchmark
Container.Overview:
Local LLM Benchmark provides reproducible benchmarking for local and OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoints.
Features include: - single tests, profile runs, and batch matrix mode - runtime metrics like walltime, TTFT, and tokens/s - analysis and runs views with export options - optional meta-evaluation workflow
This template is configured for Unraid Community Applications with container WebUI port 3005 (host default 38005).
Container.Description: Install Local LLM Benchmark in Unraid to compare LLM systems with structured tests and clear performance metrics.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port used to access the Local LLM Benchmark WebUI.

Config.Name: Meta Public Port
Config.Description: Port for optional meta-evaluation public endpoint exposure.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent benchmark data (systems, prompts, runs, meta jobs, config).
